induction_input: The client the designer called arrived.
The package the courier delivered broke.
The artist the gallery sponsored painted.
The student the teacher praised graduated.

induced_prompt_raw: Generate simple sentences containing a single relative clause where a subject noun is modified by an object relative clause (Subject-Object-Verb), such as "The [noun] the [noun] [verb] [verb]." Avoid nested or multiple relative clauses (double center-embedding).
